# Collect customer phone numbers

Collect a phone number for shipping or invoicing when your customer makes a payment.

## Index

This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case:

- [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/phone-numbers.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted)
- [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/phone-numbers.md?payment-ui=embedded-page)
- [Embedded form](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/phone-numbers.md?payment-ui=checkout-form)
